Changelog

Source: NEWS.md

forcis 0.1.0.9000

Answers to editor and reviewer comments:

  • Refactor code of read_*_data() functions (#85)
  • Recommend to use air to automatically format code (#80)
  • Homogeneize function outputs (tibble) (#82)
  • Use the same prefix forcis_ in global options (#81)
  • Remove the usage of the hidden dotfile .forcis (#87)
  • Add a statement of need (#84)
  • Improve documentation (#64, #65, #66)
  • Add funder in DESCRIPTION (#69)
  • Improve unit tests (#67, #68, #79, #88)

forcis 0.1.0

First stable release.

N.B. This release has been submitted to rOpenSci for review.

On this page

Developed by Nicolas Casajus, Mattia Greco, Sonia Chaabane, Xavier Giraud, Thibault de Garidel-Thoron, FRB-CESAB.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.1.
